en: And Balaam said to Balak, "Build for me here seven altars, and prepare for me here seven bulls and seven rams."
zh: 巴蘭對巴勒說：“你要在這裡給我築七座祭壇，給我預備七頭公牛，七隻公綿羊。”

en: Balak did as Balaam had said. And Balak and Balaam offered on each altar a bull and a ram.
zh: 巴勒照著巴蘭吩咐的行了；巴勒和巴蘭在每座祭壇上獻一頭公牛和一隻公綿羊。

en: And Balaam said to Balak, "Stand beside your burnt offering, and I will go. Perhaps the LORD will come to meet me, and whatever he shows me I will tell you." And he went to a bare height,
zh: 巴蘭對巴勒說：“你要站在你的燔祭旁邊，我要往前去，或者耶和華會來迎見我；他指示我甚麼，我必告訴你。”於是巴蘭上了一塊高地。

en: and God met Balaam. And Balaam said to him, "I have arranged the seven altars and I have offered on each altar a bull and a ram."
zh: 神迎見巴蘭；巴蘭對 神說：“我已經預備了七座祭壇，在各座祭壇上獻了一頭公牛和一隻公綿羊。”

en: And the LORD put a word in Balaam's mouth and said, "Return to Balak, and thus you shall speak."
zh: 耶和華把話傳給巴蘭，又說：“你要回到巴勒那裡去，要這樣這樣說。”

en: And he returned to him, and behold, he and all the princes of Moab were standing beside his burnt offering.
zh: 他就回到巴勒那裡，見他和摩押所有的領袖都站在燔祭旁邊。

en: And Balaam took up his discourse and said, "From Aram Balak has brought me, the king of Moab from the eastern mountains: 'Come, curse Jacob for me, and come, denounce Israel!'
zh: 巴蘭就作歌，說： “巴勒把我從亞蘭領出來， 摩押王引我出東山，說： ‘來吧，為我咒罵雅各， 來啊，咒罵以色列。’

en: How can I curse whom God has not cursed? How can I denounce whom the LORD has not denounced?
zh: 神沒有咒詛的，我怎能咒詛呢？ 耶和華沒有咒罵的，我怎能咒罵呢？

en: For from the top of the crags I see him, from the hills I behold him; behold, a people dwelling alone, and not counting itself among the nations!
zh: 我從高峰觀看他們， 從山上眺望他們； 這是獨居的民族， 不列在萬國之中。

en: Who can count the dust of Jacob or number the fourth part of Israel? Let me die the death of the upright, and let my end be like his!"
zh: 誰能數算雅各的灰塵？ 誰能計算以色列的四分之一呢？ 願我的死像正直人的死， 願我之終如正直人之終。”

en: And Balak said to Balaam, "What have you done to me? I took you to curse my enemies, and behold, you have done nothing but bless them."
zh: 巴勒對巴蘭說：“你向我作的是甚麼事呢？我領你來咒詛我的仇敵，你反倒給他們祝福。”

en: And he answered and said, "Must I not take care to speak what the LORD puts in my mouth?"
zh: 巴蘭回答，說：“耶和華傳給我的話，我怎能不謹慎說呢？”

en: And Balak said to him, "Please come with me to another place, from which you may see them. You shall see only a fraction of them and shall not see them all. Then curse them for me from there."
zh: 巴勒對巴蘭說：“請你與我到另一個地方去，從那裡你可以看見他們；不過你不能看見他們全部，只能看見他們邊界的一部分；在那裡你要為我咒詛他們。”

en: And he took him to the field of Zophim, to the top of Pisgah, and built seven altars and offered a bull and a ram on each altar.
zh: 於是巴勒帶巴蘭到了瑣腓田，上了毘斯迦山頂，築了七座祭壇，在每座祭壇上獻了一頭公牛和一隻公綿羊。

en: Balaam said to Balak, "Stand here beside your burnt offering, while I meet the LORD over there."
zh: 巴蘭對巴勒說：“你要在這裡站在你的燔祭旁邊，等我到那邊去迎見耶和華。”

en: And the LORD met Balaam and put a word in his mouth and said, "Return to Balak, and thus shall you speak."
zh: 耶和華見了巴蘭，把話傳給他，說：“你回到巴勒那裡去，要這樣這樣說。”

en: And he came to him, and behold, he was standing beside his burnt offering, and the princes of Moab with him. And Balak said to him, "What has the LORD spoken?"
zh: 巴蘭回到巴勒那裡，見他站在自己的燔祭旁邊，摩押的領袖也與他在那裡。巴勒問巴蘭：“耶和華說了甚麼話呢？”

en: And Balaam took up his discourse and said, "Rise, Balak, and hear; give ear to me, O son of Zippor:
zh: 巴蘭作歌，說： “巴勒啊，要起來聽； 西撥的兒子啊，側耳聽我。

en: God is not man, that he should lie, or a son of man, that he should change his mind. Has he said, and will he not do it? Or has he spoken, and will he not fulfill it?
zh: 神不是人，必不致說謊， 也不是人子，必不致後悔。 他說話，怎能不作？ 他發言，怎能不作成？

en: Behold, I received a command to bless: he has blessed, and I cannot revoke it.
zh: 我奉命來祝福； 神要賜福，我不能改變。

en: He has not beheld misfortune in Jacob, nor has he seen trouble in Israel. The LORD their God is with them, and the shout of a king is among them.
zh: 在雅各中不見罪孽， 在以色列中也不見患難； 耶和華他們的 神與他們同在， 有君王歡呼的聲音在他們中間。

en: God brings them out of Egypt and is for them like the horns of the wild ox.
zh: 領他們出埃及的 神， 對他們有如野牛的角。

en: For there is no enchantment against Jacob, no divination against Israel; now it shall be said of Jacob and Israel, 'What has God wrought!'
zh: 在雅各中沒有觀兆的， 在以色列中也沒有占卜； 到了適當的時候，必有話對雅各和以色列說： ‘ 神為他們行了何等的大事！’

en: Behold, a people! As a lioness it rises up and as a lion it lifts itself; it does not lie down until it has devoured the prey and drunk the blood of the slain."
zh: 這民族起來有如母獅， 挺身好像公獅； 不吃下獵物，不喝被殺的人的血， 決不臥下。”

en: And Balak said to Balaam, "Do not curse them at all, and do not bless them at all."
zh: 巴勒對巴蘭說：“你一點不要咒詛他們，也不要祝福他們。”

en: But Balaam answered Balak, "Did I not tell you, 'All that the LORD says, that I must do'?"
zh: 巴蘭回答巴勒說：“我不是告訴過你說：‘耶和華吩咐我的，我都必要遵行’嗎？”

en: And Balak said to Balaam, "Come now, I will take you to another place. Perhaps it will please God that you may curse them for me from there."
zh: 巴勒對巴蘭說：“你來，我領你到另一個地方去，或者 神喜歡你，你就可以在那裡為我咒詛他們。”

en: So Balak took Balaam to the top of Peor, which overlooks the desert.
zh: 於是，巴勒領巴蘭到了俯視曠野的毘珥山頂去。

en: And Balaam said to Balak, "Build for me here seven altars and prepare for me here seven bulls and seven rams."
zh: 巴蘭對巴勒說：“你要在這裡給我築七座祭壇，也要為我預備七頭公牛和七隻公綿羊。”

en: And Balak did as Balaam had said, and offered a bull and a ram on each altar.
zh: 巴勒就照著巴蘭所說的行了，在每座祭壇上，獻上一頭公牛和一隻公綿羊。
